sous_titres.text: You're participating in the Miss International Queen pageant.
Please tell our audience how you feel.
I'm so nervous, but I'm so excited to take the throne today.
Excuse me! Move aside, please! Move aside!
♪ You say I look so different ♪
What are you doing? Hurry up. Let's go.
You heard your father. Go change.
It's almost over, let him finish.
♪ It's like you're behind a wall… ♪
♪ And take us just the way we are… ♪
I'm just singing a song that I really like.
Stop making fun of all my clothes.
KENJI ONISHI KIDS AMATEUR SINGING CONTEST
We both think that you should ask him out.
What are you waiting for? Just do it.
I got a new bra yesterday. It's really cute.
DEAR TAKESHI, YOU'RE ALWAYS SO POSITIVE
♪ How could you do that to me? ♪
Why does everybody laugh at me?
What the heck even am I?
-You're drinking too much, Wada. -You're a doctor, remember?
Hey, didn't you quit the police hospital right after you signed up?
You're pretty odd for a skilled surgeon.
All right, fine, I'll give you one…
surgeons don't care about the patients they operate on.
All they care about is the surgery.
So tell us. What's your plan now, Wada?
I can't save a single patient.
I just… I just make people look good. I'm a fake doctor.
-I bet I think about that more than you! -Whoa!
-Oh! So much meat here. -Don't throw that!
There's so much meat to… cut up!
Can I, uh… skip school tomorrow?
Go to school. Skipping can become a habit.
What, where are you going? School?
You should eat more. You hardly had any.
Do you have a dick or not?
Look at all that makeup! Look at him! I can get these!
I'm sure you must have some part in all of this.
Try to be more masculine, all right?
♪ If you know what I mean ♪
♪ If you know what mean, yeah-ah-ah-ah ♪
-Come on, Megumi. You gotta smile more. -All right.
Marumi, you are doing way too much.
I just thought you were so beautiful.
But I… had a feeling you weren't a regular woman.
Most people rarely ever notice that I have a dick.
My dream is to be an idol like Seiko.
Do you think I could come work here for you?
I want to be up on stage. I want to dance and I want to sing.
Ever since I was little, I've always wanted to wear pretty skirts,
but I had to wear pants because I was a boy.
Everybody in my class… calls me "okama."
I started to think that I wasn't even human.
Stop with the tragic heroine victim act.
It's the same for all of us.
Everybody has their own sob story, a lot of them worse than yours.
And if you pretend you are, you've already lost.
I know it hurts but you'll be fine.
-You mean that? -An okama always keeps their word.
Listen. I'll make one thing very clear.
It doesn't matter how much you do here,
you'll never become a real woman.
Instead, what you can become is what we call a "newhalf." Got it?
It's the top of the fourth inning,
and the Giants are up to bat.
Neither team has managed to score any runs…
We get more surprise tests than all the other classes.
So my friends… want to study at the library after school.
Yeah, me and my friends want to study there.
You're a man. Do it right.
Really? You've never studied in your life. Not that I know of.
Will my grandson be a doctor? A minister?
Hey now. Don't say that to him. He's trying as hard as he can.
I don't think… I'm going to become a doctor or a minister.
I'm going to be a newhalf.
-Did you get another boob job? -Hah, You're just jealous of me, babe.
-Yeah, right. -I picked up my prescription yesterday...
How many pills are you taking?
-Five? Are you feeling okay? -That's a reaction.
-I'm throwing up every day. -I bet you are.
-That's awful. -But my boobs are growing. See?
-You feel like a real woman. -It's worth it!
Oh yeah? Wow, this doesn't sound like you at all.
It may not look like it, but I get hormone shots
I still prefer my hormones from eating yakiniku rather than pills though.
Place this carefully backstage, then go to Aki's place.
Hey Miss! Wanna grab some tea?

Would you rather have pig eyelids or double eyelids?
I told you my whole story.
And that's all you have to say to me? Give me a better answer!
I'm giving you this advice for your own good!
Who did this work on your nose, anyway?
Sue them, get compensation, and then I'll try to fix it.
Think it over. They'll just take your money!
WADA PLASTIC SURGERY CLINIC PREMARIN - JORDAN PUB
We are so beautiful, don't you think?
I was talking to myself in the mirror.
You finally found someone who will listen to you?
You should try to be more like me.
I got scared, so I left our card.
-Well, that doctor's kind of rude. -Okay, girl!
The dress is cute on you! Right?
-Mm-hmm. -You better enjoy it while you can.
Won't be long before you're bulging everywhere.
I was as thin as you are. Before.
The ones who bloom slowly at first tend to grow a lot later on.
What did you eat to get that big?
I feel a lot better now.
Please get some rest. Good night.
Hey, kid. You've had way too much.
I'm not talking about alcohol. The pill.
Wait, kid. Come back. I have more to say.
I want "Ai" to be truly loved, kid.
He's been coming home really late.
He even dropped out of high school. What's he thinking?
Ask him yourself if you're so worried.
Nope, I'm determined never to cheat on you. Yeah...
-Why would you say that? -Can't believe dad said that.
I know y'all want my balls!

Can you tell me what you do for work?
It's just… today was my debut.
You seemed so true to yourself.
It was like you were born to be on stage.
My mom made me a beautiful skirt to wear.
You actually wore it to the singing contest?
Yeah, and the boys were all laughing.
And said I was a weirdo.
being weird means that nobody accepts you.
So if even one person accepts you… you're not weird.
I've never heard anything as nice as that.
Doctor, I kind of have a favor to ask you.
-I can't lend money, but something else... -No, that's not it.
I read that… male hormones are made there, aren't they?
If that's true… getting rid of them...
But you're thinking about this too simply.
Doctors have been arrested for operating without permission.
Well I don't want you to get arrested.
those balls hanging from my body would fall off.
That's when I would become my true self.
It's just that no matter how much time passes, they won't.
I'm even growing a beard now.
Obviously, I want to get a surgery consultation.
I just need a little more time, okay?
You can't do this on whim! Understand?
This is the end of your treatment. You did a great job.
-You're releasing me as your patient? -Hmm. That's right.
You can't leave me like this.
You should be grateful that you survived.
I can't live like this! I can't!
Doctor, is there something wrong? You look so serious.
Knowing you, you'll keep pestering me until I agree.
You're going to have to tell your parents, Ai.
Even if you can't tell them about the operation,
you must tell them about how you feel.
-What? What'd ya do? -Nothing. Just keep eating, all right?
Something's going on. I don't know what.
Oh, she said she has a neighborhood meeting.
Can you go to that seat over there?
Can I order a cream anmitsu?
What did you want to tell me? Hurry up, the race is about to start.
Okay. I'll say it quick then.
I want to live as a girl.
I know I was born a boy,
but I want to live as a girl from now on.
I am your father. No matter what.
I thought you'd be more… masculine if I made you play baseball.
Never regret your decision, all right?
If you're a man, then be the best man!
That's three things to promise, not one.
I just told you I'm going to live as a girl.
I feel bad for my mom.
She gave birth to a healthy baby.
I'm glad you said that you'd help.
There's no one else I would want here.
That I shine like a star.
I want you to know something.
In my eyes, you're not weird.
I'm really glad to hear that.
To be an idol of idols.
Oh, it's swollen like a balloon.
Even if you take the balls, the sack's still there.
Where did I put that picture? Where is it? Where did I…
-Get a good look, isn't this special? -Ha.
Aw! It looks just like that… you girls know, that raccoon dog!
No, wait! Please don't say that!
How's it make you feel, huh?
Ai! Ai! Ai! Ai! Ai! Ai!
-Go, Ai! Go, Ai! Go, Ai! -Yes, queen!

I could just butter you up and eat you!

It's your fault! You are guilty!

about the noise coming from the lines at your clinic.

I'll make sure we keep the noise down.
Isn't it tough to keep control of so many strange freaks?
Ai, you're unbelievably cute, ya know.
I'm not… a normal kinda girl.
I want you so bad right now.
Oh. I'm on. See you later, okay?

You should be prepared for that.
Oh! I'll be lonely without you here.

I think I'm the happiest I've ever been.

Can you make me a woman?
I don't have that kind of relationship with her.

You have to cut and invert the penis, then create a vagina.
You have to maintain the excretory functions.

It's like we're playing God here.

If I were born a woman, I wouldn't feel like this.
I wanna gamble not waking up.

you will finally be your true self.

he'll have one less reason to smile.

always asked how you were doing.

I couldn't be around you at all.

I'd been turning away from you since you were little.

I'm sorry I was such a… awful mother.

you will always be my child.
Do me a favor, will you, Ai?
Yes, Ai. I came to see you… when you performed at the club.
You were so cute in your makeup.
I am so proud of you.
Ai, I think that you're beautiful.

it was a complication called ARDS from the anesthesia.

Now then. Shall we get started today?

you're trying to make the cause of death an overdose of anesthesia

As a way to say thanks,
we take our jobs seriously and try to reduce patients' suffering,

you're the one who led me on my path.

your path has only led you here.
who put their trust in me.
